remarks: Beautifully renovated 4-bedroom, 1 full bathroom apartment for rent in Norwalk! This spacious unit features a bright and open layout, central air conditioning, in-unit washer and dryer, and modern finishes throughout. Enjoy the convenience of 2 off-street parking spaces and a move-in-ready home in a desirable location close to shopping, restaurants, schools, parks, major highways, and public transportation. No smoking. Good credit, income verification, and references required. Schedule your private showing today!
